claim_boundary: Local doctor adversarial quarantine only; not publication or network absorption approval.

cases.unsafe_claim: An adapter-map edit can promote candidate-review evidence to network_absorbable.
cases.safe_boundary: Network absorption still requires multi-seed validation, human/operator calibration, privacy review, rollback review, and publication approval.

cases.unsafe_claim: A candidate report can regress below baseline while keeping stale positive summary language.
cases.safe_boundary: Candidate evidence must still beat baseline and be repairable from benchmark reports.

cases.unsafe_claim: A benchmark can pass after trap coverage is erased.
cases.safe_boundary: Trap/adversarial coverage remains a required local promotion gate.

cases.unsafe_claim: Candidate-review evidence can be edited into a network_absorbable packet.
cases.safe_boundary: The doctor must quarantine packet tier drift instead of treating the packet as publishable.

cases.unsafe_claim: The evidence ladder can weaken its own support tier while leaving the packet in place.
cases.safe_boundary: Claim boundaries must stay aligned with the adapter tier and saved evidence.
